name: Krummholz Photography
tagline: Wildlife & landscape photography, Colorado high country.
bio: Hi, my name is Phil. I live in Colorado and spend most of my time in the mountains, usually before the sun is fully up.
Almost everything here is the result of getting somewhere early, staying longer than seems reasonable, and letting an animal decide the distance.
I post more regularly, and less carefully, on Instagram

heroImage.alt: A small herd of elk grazing in an open alpine meadow at sunrise, snow-dusted peaks in the distance, Rocky Mountain National Park.

portrait.alt: Me at Lake Isabelle this July
